Resonance Capture During Migration

A. Author11footnotemark: 1
Abstract

For a p:qp:q resonance, capture requires eccentricities above a threshold emine_{min}.

1 Model

The scaling factor is 1dk\frac{1}{\sqrt{d_{k}}}, which grows large222Assume components with mean 00 and variance 11. in high dimensions.

ℰ\displaystyle\mathcal{E}=\sum_{i=1}^{n}\left(\frac{q_{i}}{2}\right) (1)
